positive: A minimalist, stylized representation of a majestic lion's head, rendered as a clean, geometric silhouette with intersecting lines and optical illusions. The mane should be composed of intricate, flowing shapes that mimic both smoke and foliage. The style is modern abstract linework combined with Pacific Northwest tattoo art aesthetics, utilizing deep emerald green, burnt orange, and charcoal black ink against a crisp white background. The composition must be perfectly centered, optimized for full-body apparel printing, achieving strong contrast and an elegant, timeless look. Highly detailed, vector graphic quality, single continuous line art feel.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noise, artifacts, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, jpeg artifacts, color gradients (unless intended in the lines)
